case_title: GARRICK DUCKLER VS. NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF THIRD PARTY ACTION ASSINGMENT OF JUDGMENT TO LABOR COMMISSIONER, STATE OF CALIFORNIA, ASSIGNEE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF DUCKLER, GARRICK AS TO DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF DUCKLER, GARRICK

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DUCKLER, GARRICK AS TO DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
